narrative:
Stock (precinct in Noble County) has 201 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 34.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 13.4 percentage points.
